news.t: VanEck Launches VEFA: ETF Built on MSCI EAFE Analyst Sentiment Factor

holdings.infoBox: VEFA is an equity ETF with a total of 108 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 4.73%, ABB Ltd at 2.54%, Rio Tinto Group at 2.47%, BHP Group at 2.36%, and Oversea-Chinese Banking Corporation at 2.25%.

overview.description: The VanEck MSCI EAFE Analyst Sentiment ETF (VEFA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE Analyst Sentiment Select index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap stocks, from developed markets outside North America, that are identified to have positive analyst sentiment signals based on five revision categories namely EPS, sales, cash flow, price targets, and analyst recommendations. VEFA was launched on Apr 1, 2026 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: MSCI EAFE Analyst Sentiment Select Index

data.title: VanEck Launches VEFA: ETF Built on MSCI EAFE Analyst Sentiment Factor
data.text: NEW YORK, April 2, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- VanEck today announced the launch of the VanEck MSCI EAFE Analyst Sentiment ETF (VEFA), a new strategy designed to help investors access developed international...
